title: sorbus aria var. majestica
intro: Sorbus aria var. majestica, also known as the Whitebeam tree or Mountain Ash, is a deciduous tree that belongs to the Rosaceae family. It is a variant of the Sorbus aria tree, which is native to Europe and Western Asia, and is known for its white or pale pink flowers and red berries. The medicinal properties of Sorbus aria var. majestica include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used in traditional medicine to treat a variety of health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory infections. The health benefits of Sorbus aria var. majestica include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, and support the immune system, and it can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for herbal remedies.
